style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A single pendulum hangs from a pivot and swings between two labelled posts: « CENTRALISER » on the left and « DÉCENTRALISER » on the right. Beneath « CENTRALISER », small captions read « ÉCONOMIE D'ÉCHELLE » and « GOULOT D'ÉTRANGLEMENT ». Beneath « DÉCENTRALISER », small captions read « AUTONOMIE » and « DUPLICATION ». A faint arc shows the swing. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
